metrics.missing_behavior: Missing when L1D access or refill event is unsupported; Undefined when access is zero
metrics.physical_meaning: L1D access 中沒有造成 refill 的比例，代表 L1D 命中率的 sampling 近似。

metrics.missing_behavior: Missing when L2D access or refill event is unsupported; Undefined when access is zero
metrics.physical_meaning: L2D access 中沒有造成 refill 的比例，代表 L2D 命中率的 sampling 近似。

metrics.missing_behavior: Missing when neither L3D nor LLC fallback events are available; Undefined when access is zero
metrics.physical_meaning: L3D 或 last-level cache access 中未 refill/miss 的比例，代表較外層 cache 命中率的 sampling 近似。
